scripts.tauri:dev: bun run rec:build && tauri dev --config src-tauri/crates/keeper/tauri.conf.json
scripts.tauri:build: bun run rec:build && tauri build --config src-tauri/crates/keeper/tauri.conf.json
scripts.bindings:check: bun run test:rust && test -z "$(git status --porcelain -- src/lib/ipc/gen)"
scripts.check:core-tauri-free: tree=$(cargo tree --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -p keeper-core -e normal,build --prefix none) && ! printf '%s' "$tree" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]])tauri(-[a-z]+)* v'
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run check:core-tauri-free
scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.check:all: bun run check && bun run check:rust && bun run test:rust && bun run bindings:check && bun run check:licenses
